title: Notating Rhythm
text: Notating RhythmIn the next video, we're going to notate the rhythm of Queen's 'Another One Bites the Dust'.We suggest you follow along with our example. Pause the video whenever you need to, and try to notate the rhythm yourself as we go along. Here's another exercise: Make up a rhythm pattern, or choose a groove / riff / rhythm pattern that you particularly like, and have a go at transcribing it yourself.You're very welcome to share your work on the discussion forum, to ask questions and share tips with one another about the task.  The transcription of musical sounds can be as much an art as a precise science. Notice what you learn  from this exercise.
